title: Stereotactic Body Radiotherapy vs Sorafenib Alone in Hepatocellular Carcinoma: The NRG Oncology/RTOG 1112 Phase 3 Randomized Clinical Trial.
abstract: Most patients with locally advanced hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) recur within the liver following systemic therapy.
trial_name: Stereotactic body radiotherapy vs sorafenib alone in hepatocellular carcinoma
